arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy bids to solve problem where Leicester City are still the worst in the league
arts.sum: Only Southampton have mustered fewer shots from their own corners and free-kicks, but it’s City who have the lowest expected goals (3.04). In the 2021-22 season, City were a good team who just couldn’t defend corners and free-kicks.

arts.ttl: “Would tell him to come here” – Leicester City player tells Tottenham man to join Foxes
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s Alejo Véliz has been asked to consider a move to Leicester City. That’s come from Leicester’s Facundo Buonanotte, and he mentioned the Spurs man during a chat with Sportscenter, relayed by Olé. The 19-year-old attacking midfielder joined Leicester on loan from Brighton & Hove Albion in the summer window, while the Tottenham striker The post “Would tell him to come here” – Leicester City player tells Tottenham man to join Foxes appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Leicester City triple January transfer warning with Riyad Mahrez not the blueprint - Jordan Blackwell - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: There is an argument that, in fact, signing Robert Huth on loan from Stoke was the most impactful piece of business City have done in the winter window. And history says they need to target signings like Huth when the window opens next month, and heed the triple warning from two years ago.
